highlight.role: ACCENT / HIGHLIGHT words — per-word emphasis on key nouns/verbs (e.g. underline a hook punchline, signature flourish, brand callouts)

lut.intent: cinematic celluloid film grade — slight desaturation, lifted blacks, warm-leaning midtones. Apply on every A-roll clip; lighter touch on Pexels B-roll.

highlightRule: Aston Script always for the SINGLE most-emphasized word per caption. Default Inter for everything else.
captionPattern: Inter for the line, Aston Script for the highlight word — colored or scale-bumped to draw the eye.
